articles.author: Dennis Romero
articles.title: Remains found in New Mexico national forest ID’d as those of Melissa Casias, who vanished last year - NBC News
articles.description: Human remains found by a hiker last week in a New Mexico national forest are those of a Los Alamos National Laboratory employee who had been missing for nearly a year, authorities said
articles.content:
Human remains found by a hiker last week in a New Mexico national forest are those of a Los Alamos National Laboratory employee who had been missing for nearly a year, authorities said.
